column1: # Sweep nano_s12 — N1b EMA blend α sweep on Nano (2026-04-21)
# PURPOSE: fast 180-step probe of EMA_BLEND_ALPHA effect on small-scale BPB.
# Nano has σ≈0.008 at 180 steps; 2 seeds per α gives paired-diff test.
# DECISION: best α must beat α=1.0 (pure EMA) mean by ≥0.005 (>2σ on Nano) on mean-of-2-seeds.
# If Nano signal matches Spark s33 signal → confident lock. If disagree → defer to Spark only.

column2: TIMEOUT_SECS=3600 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3000 DISABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=1 QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 SCALAR_LR=0.030 MATRIX_LR=0.040 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=32768 TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=1024 ITERATIONS=180 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=60 SEED=1337 EMA_BLEND_ALPHA=1.0 VAL_BATCH_TOKENS=8192 EVAL_SEQ_LEN=512 MAX_VAL_TOKENS=500000
